description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City will sell premium digital vouchers for use at local shops. The program supports local businesses and helps residents cope with rising prices, using national funding for price-related emergency regional revitalization grants.

Full details will be announced in the June issue of the Hanno City Newsletter and on this page.

Please check back soon.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/sangyoshinkoka/13410.html
summary: ℹ️ Notice: Hanno City Premium Digital Vouchers Program
